deliveries_delivered_at_gte_scheduled_at.name: deliveries_delivered_at_gte_scheduled_at
deliveries_delivered_at_gte_scheduled_at.value: "deliveries"."delivered_at" IS NULL OR "deliveries"."scheduled_at" IS NULL OR "deliveries"."delivered_at" >= "deliveries"."scheduled_at"

deliveries_cancelled_at_gte_scheduled_at.name: deliveries_cancelled_at_gte_scheduled_at
deliveries_cancelled_at_gte_scheduled_at.value: "deliveries"."cancelled_at" IS NULL OR "deliveries"."scheduled_at" IS NULL OR "deliveries"."cancelled_at" >= "deliveries"."scheduled_at"

users_admin_or_role_check.name: users_admin_or_role_check
users_admin_or_role_check.value: ("users"."is_admin" = true AND "users"."role_id" IS NULL) OR ("users"."is_admin" = false AND "users"."role_id" IS NOT NULL)

products_dimensions_all_or_none.name: products_dimensions_all_or_none
products_dimensions_all_or_none.value:
(
        ("products"."length" IS NULL AND "products"."width" IS NULL AND "products"."height" IS NULL AND "products"."dimension_unit" IS NULL)
        OR
        ("products"."length" IS NOT NULL AND "products"."width" IS NOT NULL AND "products"."height" IS NOT NULL AND "products"."dimension_unit" IS NOT NULL)
      )

production_plan_items_estimated_end_date.name: production_plan_items_estimated_end_date_gte_start_date
production_plan_items_estimated_end_date.value: "production_plan_items"."estimated_end_date" IS NULL OR "production_plan_items"."start_date" IS NULL OR "production_plan_items"."estimated_end_date" >= "production_plan_items"."start_date"

production_plan_items_completed_at_gte_s.name: production_plan_items_completed_at_gte_start_date
production_plan_items_completed_at_gte_s.value: "production_plan_items"."completed_at" IS NULL OR "production_plan_items"."start_date" IS NULL OR "production_plan_items"."completed_at" >= "production_plan_items"."start_date"

installations_installed_at_gte_scheduled.name: installations_installed_at_gte_scheduled_at
installations_installed_at_gte_scheduled.value: "installations"."installed_at" IS NULL OR "installations"."scheduled_at" IS NULL OR "installations"."installed_at" >= "installations"."scheduled_at"

installations_cancelled_at_gte_scheduled.name: installations_cancelled_at_gte_scheduled_at
installations_cancelled_at_gte_scheduled.value: "installations"."cancelled_at" IS NULL OR "installations"."scheduled_at" IS NULL OR "installations"."cancelled_at" >= "installations"."scheduled_at"
